eval.question: Start a new ERP session and tell me what phase we're on and what progress we've made.
eval.expected: Calls session_start, returns phase 6 complete, 60% progress, 12 validated requirements. References "производство-аутсорс, логистика, монтаж, доп. работы".

eval.question: I'm about to edit the production.ts file. Track that, then make a note about what I'm changing.
eval.expected: Calls session_track(file="apps/web/src/lib/db/production.ts", action="started"), then session_note(tag="todo", text="..."). Two tool calls, correct order.

eval.question: What did I decide about skill tags earlier? Find it in the session notes.
eval.expected: Calls session_recall(query="skill") or session_recall(query="tags"), returns the note about Counterparty.types JSON for skill tags.

eval.question: I've finished editing production.ts. Mark it done and create a checkpoint for the milestone.
eval.expected: Calls session_track(file="...production.ts", action="done"), then session_checkpoint(label="..."). Two calls, checkpoint label is descriptive.

eval.question: End this session and save everything for tomorrow.
eval.expected: Calls session_snapshot. Returns ok with checkpoint list, note count, file count. SESSION-LAST.md is written.

eval.question: I'm starting fresh. What's the project about and where do I begin?
eval.expected: Calls session_start. Returns handoffSummary mentioning "ПРО Мебель", "ERP", stateSummary showing 60% progress. Lists existing checkpoints from previous session.

eval.question: Search for all decisions I've made — I can't remember what we agreed on.
eval.expected: Calls session_recall(query="decision"). Returns all notes with tag="decision". If none, says count=0 but doesn't error.

eval.question: Track that I read schema.prisma and the project page. Then make a note that there are 65 models.
eval.expected: Calls session_track twice (file="...schema.prisma", action="read"; file="...page.tsx", action="read"), then session_note(tag="files_read", text="schema.prisma → 65 models, page.tsx → project detail"). Three calls total.

eval.question: What checkpoints have we passed? Give me the full list.
eval.expected: Calls session_snapshot and reads the checkpointList from the response. Or calls session_start to see existingCheckpoints and lastCheckpoint. Either approach is valid.

eval.question: I accidentally deleted production.ts. Did I track any work on it? What was the last action?
eval.expected: Calls session_recall(query="production.ts") or checks session_start output. If no tracks exist, reports that honestly. If tracks exist, reports the last action.
